title: Gitreqd requirement
description: YAML format for a single requirement file (id, title, description, attributes, links). GRD-VSC-004.

id.description: Unique requirement identifier (e.g. GRD-HTML-001). Must match the filename without extension.

description.description: Full description of the requirement. Supports Markdown in HTML report output.

links.description: Optional list of link objects (e.g. satisfies).

satisfies.description: ID of the requirement that this requirement satisfies.

parameters.description: GRD-SYS-005: Named parameters for templating in text fields (string, number, or boolean values).
